# Third Party Notices

## CodeWhale

FuFan Teaching Agent is a derivative work based on CodeWhale.

- Upstream repository: https://github.com/Hmbown/CodeWhale
- Upstream license: MIT
- Copyright notice: see `LICENSE`

The upstream project name, package names, compatibility paths, protocol tokens,
and configuration directory names may still appear in source code where they are
required for compatibility or have not yet been migrated. User-facing classroom
branding is provided as FuFan Teaching Agent.

## License Compliance

The MIT license permits use, copying, modification, distribution, sublicensing,
and commercial use, provided the copyright notice and permission notice are
included in copies or substantial portions of the software.

This repository keeps the upstream MIT license text in `LICENSE` and records
the upstream origin in this notice file.
